value.found_quote: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates the claim. It explicitly states that Claude Code connects to external tools and data sources via MCP, describes MCP as an open-source standard, and documents both locally-run stdio servers and hosted/remote HTTP, SSE, and WebSocket servers. The documentation is a full reference guide for a generally available feature, indicating active status.
